leona.name: Leona

skill1: ■ Activates after 15 normal attack(s). Affects all allies with a Shotgun.

caveats: skill1: 'Maximum Effective Range ▲ 20%' to shotgun allies is not modeled — the engine has no range stat and shotgun pellet landing is a fixed measured table; real effect (better far-band landing) is a known under-model
skill2: Hit Rate ▲ 20.28% is recorded but inert in the engine (100% accuracy assumed); in reality it raises the core-hit rate by an unmeasured amount
skill2: '+5 pellets' is modeled as Normal Attack +50% to ALL shotgun allies (kit: only the 2 highest-ATK shotgun allies) — over-applies in teams running 3 or more shotguns, including Leona herself
burst: the 21.32% crit-rate line assumes Roar is fully stacked at her burst cast (the stack-count gate is not modeled and may not always hold)
